interpretation:
INTERPRETATION
--------------------------------------------------
  FC1 (Specification) traces predominantly map to GC3 (100% of row).
  FC2 (Misalignment) traces predominantly map to GC3 (100% of row).
  FC3 (Verification) traces predominantly map to GC3 (100% of row).

  ORTHOGONAL STRUCTURE: All three MAST categories map to the same GeoCert category (GC3). The two taxonomies are capturing different axes of failure.

  Diagnosis confidence — mean: 0.795  min: 0.780  max: 0.915
  (Low confidence reflects that MAST traces are execution-behaviour data mapped through a heuristic bridge to GeoCert's evaluation-failure signal space.  Treat diagnosis as indicative, not definitive.)
